# Carol Davis

Senior Frontend Engineer and UI/UX specialist.

## Background

Carol has 8 years of experience in frontend development. She leads the frontend team and works on Project Alpha's user interface.

## Skills

- TypeScript, React, Vue
- CSS, Tailwind
- Figma, design systems
- Accessibility (WCAG)

## Current Work

Building the dashboard UI for Project Alpha. Collaborating with Alice Chen on API contracts and with Diana Park on design specifications.

## Notes

Carol is passionate about accessibility and ensures all interfaces meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards.
